Retimaca is a bilingual (Spanish/English) firewood supplier in South Florida.

Primary services:
- Same-day firewood delivery in Miami-Dade and Broward
- Restaurant firewood supply (pizza ovens, grills, smoking)
- Residential bundles and wholesale pallets

Core products:
- Casuarina (Australian Pine): fast, stable flame
- White Oak: dense wood for longer burn and smoking

Local intent pages:
- /es/lena-a-domicilio-miami
- /en/firewood-delivery-miami
- /es/proveedor-lena-restaurantes-doral
- /en/restaurant-firewood-supplier-doral
- /es/lena-para-hornos-pizza-kendall
- /en/pizza-oven-firewood-kendall
- /es/lena-al-mayor-broward
- /en/bulk-firewood-broward
